title: self-improve proposals
description: The typed contract between curate, the approve gate, and open-pr: maturation-ladder promotions expressed as mechanical edits. An empty `proposals` array is valid — it means everything in the snapshot was noise.

summary.description: One or two sentences for the human at the gate: what recurred, what was noise.

learning.description: The learning note(s) this promotes, quoted from the snapshot.

occurrences.description: How many snapshot lines carry this lesson.

promotion.description: The maturation-ladder rung this edit executes.

target.description: Workspace-relative file the edit amends (never absolute, never ..).

find.description: For replace: the exact text to replace (must occur exactly once in target).

rationale.description: For the human reviewer: which learnings, how often, why this rung.
